title: task
description: Python rpl/ has dao.py (~100+ lines) for Destination Advertisement Object handling. Rust lichen-rpl has dodag.rs, routing.rs, trickle.rs, message.rs but DAO appears less complete. Verify DAO parity or port Python implementation.
close_reason: Verified: Rust lichen-rpl/routing.rs has DaoManager with build_dao(), process_dao(), extract_edge(), rebuild_routes(), assemble_path(). Core DAO handling matches Python. Rust additionally has DAO sequence replay protection (dao_seq_map + seq_is_newer). Minor gaps: Rust missing remove_edge() and build_dao_ack() convenience methods - these can be added if needed but core functionality is complete.
